summary: Quest persistence bug fix verified. Fixed frontend issue where quest progress was not displaying correctly in Quest Log UI. Backend APIs working correctly (54/54 tests pass). Quest acceptance, progress tracking, and persistence across logout/login all working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (quest log displays correctly with persisted progress)

seed_data_creation: Test user: perf_test_4907564d / testpass123 (has goblin_slayer quest with 4/10 progress)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quest persistence is fully working. Key fix: GameWorld.jsx init() now maps backend progress dict to objectives' current field for UI display. Backend stores progress as {quest_id: {objective_id: value}}, frontend QuestLog expects obj.current on each objective.

quest_persistence: Quest acceptance saves to backend via acceptQuest API
Quest progress updates save to backend via updateQuestProgress API
Quests load on game init via fetchQuests API
Progress dict properly mapped to objectives' current field for UI display
Quest Log (L key) displays loaded quests with correct progress
backend_apis_tested: GET /api/quests/available - returns available, active, completed quests
POST /api/quests/progress - updates progress dict and auto-completes when done
console_logs_verified: [QUEST LOAD] Loading 1 active quests from database
[QUEST LOAD] Quest: Goblin Menace Progress: {kill_goblins: 4} Mapped objectives: [Object]
ui_elements_verified: Quest Log opens with L key
Quest 'Goblin Menace' displayed with MEDIUM difficulty badge

bug_fix_details.issue: Quest progress not displaying in Quest Log UI after login
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Backend returns progress as dict at quest level (e.g., {kill_goblins: 4}), but QuestLog component expects obj.current on each objective
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Added progress mapping in GameWorld.jsx init() - maps progress dict values to objectives' current field
